title: Characters looking at a screen
wikitext:
[]: Characters looking at a screen.             Quote Post by snow344 » Fri Sep 06, 2019 11:43 am Hey everyone, I'm sorry if this isn't the correct board to post, but does anyone have screenshots of the original series or the movies (including the theatrical versions) with any character looking at a screen? This is totally not for shitposting. Thanks in advance!

[]: Re: Characters looking at a screen.             Quote Post by 天使 | Nyo | 天使 » Wed Sep 18, 2019 12:45 pm Been looking at this post for a while with no real idea how to approach it. It depends on what you're looking for. For example, I found Asuka looking at a TV Screen by just looking up "Asuka playing video games." I think if just look up what character and action they're doing (be specific obviously), you'll find what you're looking for. Hope this helps!
